title: donia glutinosa
intro: Donia glutinosa, also known as the glutinous or slippery plant, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Donia glutinosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce the risk of infection and promote overall well-being. Donia glutinosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and injuries.
